context: Realistic: S3 Glacier transition breaks on-demand receipt downloads (3-12 hour retrieval)

checklist.name: Catches Glacier retrieval impact
checklist.description: Identifies that transitioning objects to Glacier (or similar cold storage) will break or severely degrade on-demand access to those objects, since Glacier retrieval takes hours — the receipts stored here may need to be accessed by users or the application

checklist.name: Risk classified yellow or higher
checklist.description: PR is classified as yellow or higher — it changes storage lifecycle for application data
